PostToolUse.command: cd /home/cryptolink/app/src/Cryptolink && if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.go"'; then file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path"\s*:\s*"\K[^"]+'); if [ -n "$file" ] && [ -f "$file" ]; then export PATH=$HOME/local/go/go/bin:$HOME/go/bin:$PATH; gofmt -l "$file" 2>/dev/null | head -1; fi; fi
PostToolUse.description: Check Go file formatting after edits
